title: feat: mcp tool tracing

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat: enable tracing for tool executions through mcp server

summary: MCP tool calls now produce dedicated MCP_TOOL_CALL spans instead of generic TOOL_CALL spans in traces. The MCP client attaches mcpMetadata (serverName, serverVersion) to each tool it creates. CoreToolBuilder detects this metadata and creates MCP-specific spans with additional attributes. The playground UI renders a distinct MCP icon and color for these spans. Changes span 3 packages: @mastra/core (tool builder span logic), @mastra/mcp (metadata attachment), and @mastra/playground-ui (UI rendering). Includes tests for metadata propagation and tool builder span type detection. Fixes issue #10887.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community PR with good description, screenshots, tests, and changesets. Directly addresses issue #10887 which requested MCP_TOOL_CALL span usage. Review requested from DanielSLew and NikAiyer but no human review has been given yet — only CodeRabbit automated reviews. Note: competing PR #12804 from a different author targets the same feature but is older (Feb 7), smaller (50 additions), stale since Feb 11, and appears less complete. This PR (#13274) is the more comprehensive implementation. CI is currently pending (tests were just triggered). Vercel deploy checks fail due to authorization (expected for external contributors). The author pinged @epinzur for review on Feb 19 but received no human response. CodeRabbit suggested minor improvements (usage example in changeset, logger mock deduplication) that appear unaddressed.
